chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-917 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge D/o matter 1. For order on CMA No.1262/2025 2. For order on CMA No.4247/2024 3. For order on CMA No.4248/2024 4. For order on CMA No.5175/2024 5. For order on CMA No.5176/2024 6. For order on CMA No.8170/2024 02.10.2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. M. Junaid, Advocate for respondent No.1. Ms. Deeba Ali Jaffari, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- None is present on behalf of the petitioners. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. On 29.05.2025, petitioners were put on notice to prove / show material as to existence of said family suit based upon which this petition was filed and in case of failure of showing such material, this petition is liable to be dismissed. Since no one has appeared on behalf of the petitioners on the last two dates of hearing, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
